experience.description: Built a WinForms C# checklist system for daily tracking and automated Excel/PDF reporting.
Developed a graph-based user-movie rating analysis system, implementing efficient query algorithms and achieving 100% score.
Developed AI games (Tic-Tac-Toe, Pacman) using Alpha-Beta Pruning, Uniform Cost Search, and A* algorithms.
Implemented Apriori algorithm with Hadoop MapReduce for frequent customer analysis on large-scale data, optimizing scalability and throughput.
Implemented Google's PageRank algorithm in PySpark for web graph analysis and page importance ranking, leveraging Spark DataFrame APIs.
Trained and deployed a custom YOLOv11 model for real-time football object detection, achieving high mAP and low latency.
